subcodes.first_line: With regard to the science of astronomy concerning which ye had inquired - so grievously afflicted is 'Abdu'l-Bahá that He hath not even time to take up the pen, let alone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص علم هيئت سؤال نموده بوديد. عبدالبهآء چنان مبتلا که فرصت نگاشتن نامه ندارد تا چه رسد
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
